title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kizaru, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the other day, it was the revolutionary army...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is becoming quite the historic destruction incident...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What a useless bunch of soldiers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ordered lobster for dinner the other night but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Its the first time this has happened! What will become of the food supply here in Mariejois?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, leave that matter aside for now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm injured! That "tyrant" Kuma, he's nothing but a slave...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If we can't con- troll you, then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't let a dangerous individual like you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Your mind should've been nonexistent anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone like you who's the same as being dead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where exactly are you heading to?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
